title: Биткойн  Трейдъри Разкриват Тайни за Успешна Търговия
author: TradeTravelChill
summary_bullets: This is what we are traders, we are trading both up and down and we are not interested in what we are going to do on the market.
We are going to sell our chips, what we want to say about the graphics, a little bit before that.
Absolutely nothing out of nowhere, not for me, for the students and for the team.
